cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. The question is asking between what times David could have gone to the football field. The key here is to look at all the alibis or the times when David was seen doing other activities and find the time gaps where he wasn't doing anything else. Also, we need to consider that the football field closes after 10pm, so he must have gone before that. First, let me list out all the known times when David was somewhere else: 1. David woke up at 5am. That's just a starting point. 2. Steven saw David buying a phone from 5am to 6am. So from 5-6am, he's at the electronics store. 3. Kimberly saw him at the Leaning Tower of Pisa from 6am to 8am. So 6-8am, he's there. 4. Then Betty saw him at the gym from 9am to 12pm. Wait, there's a gap between 8am and 9am here. Because after Kimberly's sighting ends at 8am, there's nothing until Betty's sighting starts at 9am. So maybe David was free between 8am and 9am? 5. Then Lisa saw him driving to the water park from 12pm to 3pm. So no gap there because it starts right after the gym. 6. William saw him on a rooftop from 3pm to 10pm. So again, no gap between Lisa's and William's sightings. But the football field closes after 10pm, so he couldn't have gone after that. So the only time when David wasn't accounted for is between 8am and 9am.
